experiment: WhatsApp Readiness CTA font-family: inherit verification
rationale: Before the test, the CTA rendered in the browser default button font (Arial) while card copy used IBM Plex Sans Arabic. After font-family: inherit, the CTA uses IBM Plex like surrounding text. Visual comparison shows the CTA remains equally prominent and polished; hierarchy is driven by font-weight 700, white-on-green contrast, and button padding—not a separate UI font.
